diagnosis.explanation: M5.1-02 replay modeled metadata, alignment, and safety overhead before assigning payload bytes. M5.1-03 full-model validation used the exact nominal payload-byte budgets. The ordered request sequence and strict global-LRU semantics agree; the different effective budgets change boundary evictions.
diagnosis.lease_lifetime: ruled_out: replay requests release each lease before the next request, and the full-model path uses the same sequential request boundary
diagnosis.cache_update_timing: ruled_out: exact nominal-budget replay matches the full-model hits, loads, and evictions
diagnosis.runtime_request_boundary: ruled_out: the authoritative ordered trace has 2304 records in both paths
diagnosis.instrumentation_placement: ruled_out: the full-model counters are derived at the ExpertStore request/load boundary and match independent trace replay
diagnosis.payload_alignment_accounting: confirmed: M5.1-02 usable budgets were 8,212,550,504 and 16,802,485,096 bytes; M5.1-03 nominal budgets were 8,589,934,592 and 17,179,869,184 bytes

decision: No runtime or cache-policy change is required for M5.2-01. Preserve both counter sets with their budget semantics explicitly labeled.
